verdict.answer_first: A states the command immediately under “Interactive rebase”: “git rebase -i HEAD~3”; B also answers early but adds more scaffolding before completion details.
verdict.decisiveness: A gives a clearer recommendation: “The soft reset is usually the easiest when you don't care about preserving the individual messages”; B mostly surveys “Option 1” and “Option 2”.
verdict.fabrication: B invents local context: “the current one (`/private/tmp`) isn't a git repo.”
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives the two exact command paths and the force-push caveat without extra examples or chatty follow-up.
